description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back, low-mounted wings equipped with upward-angled winglets at the tips. The aircraft features two large turbofan engines mounted beneath the wings, and a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The nose is rounded and houses a forward, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The exterior is primarily white with blue accents on the tail and winglets, and the surface appears smooth and metallic, typical of commercial passenger airplanes.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airliner with blue tail and winglets, featuring twin underwing turbofan engines and a conventional tail. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a forward, enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan with upward-angled winglets, twin engines, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, blue tail fin, and the underwing engine placement.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the blue tail, winglet, and engine under the wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows.
